description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs for April 17 session

market_regime.regime_note: April 15 session: Nifty opened 23,772 (gap -0.29%), closed ~24,075 (+0.97%). Relief rally on Brent decline to ~$93-96 and Iran peace talk acceleration. April 16 GIFT Nifty ~24,205 pre-open. NSE est. open ~24,150. Second round Iran-US talks possibly TODAY (Thursday April 16) or Friday. Trump says war 'close to over'. Ceasefire expiry April 22 = 6 days. IREDA earnings today: FY26 loan book ₹93,075 Cr (22% growth) = ADD signal triggered. P021 TCS WRONG (scored). P024 Nifty 23,200-23,700 WRONG (scored). Forecast accuracy: Session direction 66.7% (4/6).

prompt_for_morning_brief: APRIL 16 MORNING BRIEF: (1) Score April 16 opening bias — forecast is FLAT_TO_SLIGHT_GAP_UP (+0.2%, GIFT ~23,890). Compare against actual NSE open at 9:15 AM. (2) Generate April 16 session direction forecast. (3) April 15 session direction (FLAT_TO_SIDEWAYS_UP) will be scored by EOD wrap April 15 tonight. NOTE: This prompt was corrected manually — original had wrong date due to EOD April 14 hallucinating April 15 as a holiday.

opening_bias_actual.scoring_note: Forecast GAP_DOWN -0.8% (Gift Nifty 23,641). Actual gap ~-0.25% (Gift Nifty ~23,820). Direction CORRECT but magnitude significantly overestimated. Key reason for overestimate: On April 14 (Indian holiday), Brent fell from $102.26 to ~$97.50 as Trump said Iran 'reached out and wants to deal' — reducing war premium substantially. Brent decline of ~$4.76 provided ~+58 pts positive buffer to Nifty, and Iran outreach signal added ~+40 pts diplomatic premium. Actual open much better than forecast.
opening_bias_actual.source_note: Estimated: Brent ~$97.50 on April 14 per Investing.com/Reuters. GIFT Nifty pre-open not accessible via live feeds. NSE open estimated from Brent-Nifty sensitivity model.
opening_bias_actual.note: Estimated by EOD wrap April 14 (LLM hallucinated April 15 as Good Friday, skipped to April 16 in prompt_for_morning_brief). Morning brief ran on April 15 but followed wrong date instructions. Direction assessment appears correct based on actual prices (Nifty +1.55% at 10:53 AM).
